input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.7.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.7.3.1
            TITLE: in addition to proving that the strength of the monocoque is sufficient, the monocoque must

            CONTENT:
            rule F.7.3.1: In addition to proving that the strength of the monocoque is sufficient, the monocoque must
F.7.3.1 In addition to proving that the strength of the monocoque is sufficient, the monocoque must 
have equivalent EI to the sum of the EI of the six Steel Tubes (F.3.2.1.b) that it replaces.

final_answer: In addition to proving that the strength of the monocoque is sufficient, the monocoque must have equivalent EI to the sum of the EI of the six Steel Tubes (F.3.2.1.b) that it replaces.
